languages.text: "Потомки дезертиров, убивших своего командира. Исчерпывающая характеристика всего этого сброда".

traits.locale_text: "Потомки дезертиров, убивших своего командира. Исчерпывающая характеристика всего этого сброда".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this scum."
languages.original_text: "Потомки дезертиров, убивших своего командира. Исчерпывающая характеристика всего этого сброда".

traits.locale_text: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this entire rabble."
"Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this entire rabble."
"Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this scum."

languages.text: «Descendientes de desertores que asesinaron a su propio comandante. Es una descripción bastante exhaustiva de esta escoria».
languages.original_text: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this entire rabble."

traits.locale_text: «Descendientes de desertores que asesinaron a su propio comandante. Es una descripción bastante exhaustiva de esta escoria».

languages.text: “斩杀己方指挥官的逃兵的后裔。这一形容足以概括这群乌合之众的全部。”
languages.original_text: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this entire rabble."

traits.locale_text: “斩杀己方指挥官的逃兵的后裔。这一形容足以概括这群乌合之众的全部。”

languages.text: « Des descendants de déserteurs qui ont assassiné leur commandant. Voilà qui suffit à décrire ces gueux. »
languages.original_text: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this entire rabble."

traits.locale_text: « Des descendants de déserteurs qui ont assassiné leur commandant. Voilà qui suffit à décrire ces gueux. »

languages.text: "Kendi komutanlarını katleden asker kaçaklarının torunları. Bu, bütün ayaktakımının kapsamlı bir tanımıdır."
languages.original_text: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this entire rabble."

traits.locale_text: "Kendi komutanlarını katleden asker kaçaklarının torunları. Bu, bütün ayaktakımının kapsamlı bir tanımıdır."

languages.text: "Nachkommen von Deserteuren, die ihren eigenen Kommandeur erschlugen. Das ist eine erschöpfende Beschreibung für dieses Gesindel."
languages.original_text: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this entire rabble."

traits.locale_text: "Nachkommen von Deserteuren, die ihren eigenen Kommandeur erschlugen. Das ist eine erschöpfende Beschreibung für dieses Gesindel."

languages.text: 「逃兵の子孫で、自らの指揮官を殺した者たち。この烏合の衆の総体を言い尽くした」
languages.original_text: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this entire rabble."

traits.locale_text: 「逃兵の子孫で、自らの指揮官を殺した者たち。この烏合の衆の総体を言い尽くした」
